titles.title: Sacrifice of Praise (We Bring the Sacrifice of Praise)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord we've come into your house and we've gathered in your name it's a privileged to be here we're so very glad we came we can sense your holy presence and the warmth of your embrace as we lift our hearts in worship we bring the sacrifice of praise

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We bring the sacrifice of praise Into the house of the Lord We bring the sacrifice of praise Into the house of the Lord And we offer up to You The sacrifices of thanksgiving And we offer up to You The sacrifices of joy

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord you've taught us in your words to gives thanks in everything you'll provide a place of refuge beneath the shadow of your wings so we purpose to obey you and to walk in all your ways Lord in every situation We bring the sacrifice of praise
